form.formComment: Last start disqualified at Feurs on March 8 over 2225m. Two runs back won by a 0.1m (-25m) at Montauban beating Maria De Cani in 4yo colts and fillies claiming on February 23. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start 8th over 2700m at Lyon-la-Soie well beaten by Macker D'eronville in 4yo race on February 8 at $28. Two runs back won by 2.5m at Lyon-la-Soie beating Ma Soie Antique in 4yo race on January 25. Needs to find plenty of improvement to figure.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of ten weeks. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into eighth behind Mazel Tov Dairpet at Lyon-la-Soie over 2050m in a 4yo colts and gelding race on January 29 at $5.60. Rates highly. Big chance.
